description_long: This is a compact, stylized axe featuring a broad, asymmetrical metal blade with a jagged edge and a pronounced beard, giving it a rugged appearance. The blade is attached to a short, thick handle that is slightly curved and wrapped with a blue grip for improved handling. The head of the axe includes a pointed poll opposite the blade, which could be used for piercing or prying. The mounting of the blade to the handle is reinforced with two visible bolts or rivets, suggesting a secure and sturdy construction. The handle appears to be made of wood, with the upper and lower ends exposed, while the grip section is wrapped. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in an urban or utility context.
description: A rugged, stylized axe with a jagged metal blade, short curved wooden handle, and blue grip wrap. Features a pointed poll and reinforced mounting with bolts.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the jagged, asymmetrical blade and the blue grip wrap on the curved handle.
description_view_1: The front view shows the narrow profile of the blade and the alignment of the handle, with bolts visible on the head.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the pointed poll opposite the blade and the full curvature of the handle.
description_view_3: The rear view emphasizes the thickness of the handle and the secure mounting of the blade with visible bolts.
attribute_handle_type: Short, slightly curved wooden handle with a blue fabric grip wrap; oval cross-section; ergonomic for one-handed use.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, asymmetrical steel blade with a jagged edge and pronounced beard; single cutting edge with a pointed poll on the opposite side.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern reinforced mounting with visible bolts or rivets securing the blade to the handle.
